plan_type_rationale: Multi-phase work touching public CLI surface, doc-gen scripts, and RAG wiring. Three logically distinct deliverables (A: unified CLI, B: drift detector, C: doc-gen --project-dir). Not atomic (light) and not policy-heavy (strict).

public_api_hits: drift.json schema (contract preserved: driftPercentage / added / deleted / modified)
hotspot_hits: drift generator baseline-snapshot comparison (STUB-B root cause)
RAG embedding provider fallback paths (local-models-only constraint)
warnings: coderef-core has no docs/foundation/ tree; foundation-docs validate-only fast path skipped at WO creation.
Drift fail-fast bypassed: .coderef/reports/drift.json reports driftPercentage=18 immediately after a fresh populate-coderef run. This is the bug Phase 3 fixes.

pre_existing_drift_note: driftPercentage=18 reported by .coderef/reports/drift.json on a freshly-populated repo. The drift detector itself is the subject of Phase 3 (STUB-B). Gate bypassed to allow the fix to ship.
goal: Unified coderef-pipeline CLI + drift detector rework + doc-gen --project-dir flag; local-only Ollama RAG, no cloud fallback.

in_scope: Ollama-only guard in src/rag/ embedding provider
out_of_scope: RAG search UX changes beyond the local-only guard
constraints: RAG embeddings MUST use local Ollama-served models only; no OPENAI_API_KEY fallback, no silent cloud call.
scripts/doc-gen/ must never write outside the resolved project root.
Drift detector contract (added/deleted/modified/driftPercentage) must be preserved for backward compatibility.
